title: ジュニアカップの後に・ライバル出現！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After showing off her strength in the Junior Cup,
Mejiro Ryan is delighted to have earned her
ticket to the place she's dreamed of.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Immediately after, we hear excited cheers from
the televised broadcast of another race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin is on the screen, and she's just won her
race in spectacular fashion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the broadcast, Ines Fujin challenges Mejiro
Ryan to be her rival at the Satsuki Sho. Ryan
accepts.
